text:
Created attachment 238947
Patch for graphics/Makefile

Commit 805e6e1d61f0a4e6b8c759888e217372c30ce1c5, https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/graphics?id=805e6e1d61f0a4e6b8c759888e217372c30ce1c5, forgot to remove the corresponding entries from graphics/Makefile.
